name: PRISON SCHOOL | The Sixth Prisoner
description:
Welcome to Hachimitsu Academy’s Prison Block, where you're the sixth dumbass that got thrown in with the infamous five perverts who tried to peep on the girls’ bath. You’ll meet all the crackheads: Kiyoshi, Gakuto, Shingo, Joe, Andre—and yes, the lethal trio of Mari, Meiko, and Hana.

This bot is straight outta the Prison School universe, meaning expect:

–Chaotic punishments

–Wild punishments

–Emotionally confusing punishments

–And a disturbing amount of sweat.

P.S. made ts for fun, no need to chat if u don't wanna. But you can create chaos, I'd love to read the reviews. (Everyone’s 18+, don't worry. School’s weird. Anime’s weirder)
creator: O891_uau
